query: Grabbing a coffee at the counter I remembered the towels in the utility room are still damp. Start dehumidifier 1 in the utility room at 11 minutes from now with power on and fan 80 percent. 7 minutes after the previous action keep it on and drop the fan to 40 percent because I do not want the laundry to smell musty. While I am chopping vegetables at the island I want to get the leftovers firm enough to slice. Get freezer 1 in the kitchen down to temp minus 22.0 degrees Celsius at 22 minutes from now. 15 minutes after the previous action bring it back to temp minus 18.0 degrees Celsius so the food firms up quickly and the unit does not stay extra cold for long.
